title: Pinalia djaratensis
intro: Pinalia djaratensis, also known as the Djarat orchid, is a species of orchid native to Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The bioactive constituents of Pinalia djaratensis include flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been identified as responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional Indonesian medicine, Pinalia djaratensis is often used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and salves to support wound healing and skin health.
taxonomy: Pinalia djaratensis is a species within the genus Pinalia of the orchid family, Orchidaceae. This classification is part of the larger Angiosperm clade. The species is further classified within the order Asparagales. The family Orchidaceae is a large group of flowering plants that also includes genera like Cattleya and Phalaenopsis. Pinalia djaratensis is a rare and endemic species found in certain regions.
